meta.title: BC Provincial EMR/PCP Exam Bank
meta.source: British Columbia Provincial Examination Guidelines - April 2025

groups.descriptionZh: 基于 British Columbia Provincial Examination Guidelines 制作的 100 题模拟练习。
groups.descriptionEn: A 100-question mock practice set based on the British Columbia Provincial Examination Guidelines.

questions.questionZh: 根据 patient assessment model，哪一项是标准流程中最靠前的一步？
questions.questionEn: According to the patient assessment model, which step appears earliest in the standard sequence?
questions.explanationZh: 该模型先从 rescue/scene evaluation 进入，然后是 primary survey，再到 secondary survey、protocols、treatments、transport 与记录。
questions.explanationEn: The model moves from rescue/scene evaluation into the primary survey before secondary survey, protocols, treatments, transport, and records.

questions.questionZh: 在 exam logic 里，哪类病人应被视为 unstable 并适当快速转运？
questions.questionEn: Within the exam logic, which patient should be considered unstable and transported appropriately?

options.zh: 单纯轻微软组织挫伤且生命体征稳定
options.en: A patient with a minor soft-tissue bruise and stable vital signs

options.zh: 呼吸窘迫并使用辅助呼吸肌
options.en: A patient in respiratory distress using accessory muscles

options.zh: 单纯慢性腰痛但可自行行走
options.en: A patient with chronic low back pain who can walk

options.zh: 轻度恶心且无其他异常
options.en: A patient with mild nausea and no other abnormalities

questions.explanationZh: 呼吸窘迫/辅助呼吸肌使用属于 unstable adult patient 的 primary survey findings。
questions.explanationEn: Respiratory distress with accessory muscle use is listed as an unstable adult primary survey finding.

questions.questionZh: 下列哪项 primary survey finding 明确提示 unstable adult patient？
questions.questionEn: Which primary survey finding clearly indicates an unstable adult patient?
questions.explanationZh: 指南明确把 absent radial pulses 列为 unstable finding。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline explicitly lists absent radial pulses as an unstable finding.

questions.questionZh: 对于 major burns，哪项 anatomical finding 属于 unstable adult patient 相关内容？
questions.questionEn: For major burns, which anatomical finding is included in the unstable adult patient criteria?

options.en: A single blister on the hand

questions.explanationZh: unstable anatomical findings 包含 partial thickness >20% BSA 和 full thickness >10% BSA。
questions.explanationEn: The unstable anatomical findings include partial-thickness burns over 20% BSA and full-thickness burns over 10% BSA.

questions.questionZh: 在 primary survey intervention indications 里，什么时候应考虑 cervical spine stabilization？
questions.questionEn: In the primary survey intervention indications, when should cervical spine stabilization be considered?

options.en: Only when the patient complains of neck pain

options.zh: 满足 NEXUS/Canadian C-Spine 指征、锁骨以上明显损伤，或创伤无法排除的 unconscious patient
options.en: When NEXUS/Canadian C-Spine indications are met, there is obvious injury above the clavicles, or trauma cannot reasonably be ruled out in an unconscious patient

questions.explanationZh: 该页明确给出这几类 cervical spine stabilization 指征。
questions.explanationEn: Those are the listed indications for cervical spine stabilization in the guideline.

questions.questionZh: obstructed airway procedures 的一个明确适应证是？
questions.questionEn: A clear indication for obstructed airway procedures is?
questions.explanationZh: 无呼吸和无法通气都属于 obstructed airway procedures 的指征。
questions.explanationEn: Absence of respiration and inability to ventilate are listed indications for obstructed airway procedures.

questions.questionZh: assisting inadequate or failing respirations 的指征包括哪项？
questions.questionEn: Which finding is an indication for assisting inadequate or failing respirations?

options.zh: 浅快/费力呼吸并伴 decreasing LOC 或 cyanosis
options.en: Shallow or labored respirations with decreasing LOC or cyanosis

questions.explanationZh: 呼吸过快/过慢、窘迫、浅表或费力并伴 LOC 下降、紫绀或低氧饱和，都是协助通气的指征。
questions.explanationEn: Abnormally fast/slow, distressed, shallow, or labored respirations with decreasing LOC, cyanosis, or low oxygen saturation indicate the need to assist respirations.

questions.questionZh: 在 primary survey indications 中，哪个 intervention 与 open chest wounds 直接对应？
questions.questionEn: Which intervention corresponds directly to open chest wounds in the primary survey indications?
questions.explanationZh: open chest wounds 对应 sealing open chest wounds。
questions.explanationEn: Open chest wounds correspond to sealing open chest wounds.

questions.questionZh: rapid cooling 在 primary survey indications 中对应哪种情况？
questions.questionEn: In the primary survey indications, rapid cooling is associated with which condition?
questions.explanationZh: rapid cooling 对应 hyperthermia；gradual warming 对应 hypothermia。
questions.explanationEn: Rapid cooling is linked to hyperthermia, while gradual warming applies to hypothermia.

questions.questionZh: Critical history questions 中，MVA 场景下哪项信息属于应主动询问内容？
questions.questionEn: Under critical history questions, which item should be asked in an MVA scenario?

options.zh: 过去一年去了几次牙医
options.en: How many times the patient saw a dentist this year
What the patient ate for lunch

questions.explanationZh: MVA history 包括车辆类型、速度、restrains、intrusion、airbags 是否展开等。
questions.explanationEn: MVA history includes vehicle type, speed, restraints, compartment intrusion, and whether airbags deployed.

questions.questionZh: Fall 场景的 critical history 中，哪项是重点？
questions.questionEn: Which is a key critical-history item in a fall scenario?
questions.explanationZh: fall history 要问从哪跌下、自由落体还是撞到其他物体、落地面、先着地点等。
questions.explanationEn: Fall history includes where the patient fell from, whether there was free fall or impact with other objects, landing surface, and what struck first.

questions.questionZh: 在 shooting history 中，哪项属于应问内容？
questions.questionEn: Which item belongs in a shooting history?

options.en: Range and angle of the shot
What the patient ate for breakfast

questions.explanationZh: shooting 要问 firearm type、range、angle、bullet type、进出口伤等。
questions.explanationEn: Shooting history includes firearm type, range, angle, bullet type if possible, and entrance/exit wounds.

questions.questionZh: AVPU 中，哪一项代表病人只能对 pain 刺激有反应？
questions.questionEn: In AVPU, which category means the patient responds only to pain?
questions.explanationZh: P = responds only to pain stimuli。
questions.explanationEn: P stands for response to pain only.

questions.questionZh: AVPU 中，哪类病人默认无法保护自己的 airway，必须严密监测并干预？
questions.questionEn: In AVPU, which patient is considered unable to protect their own airway and requires close monitoring and intervention?
questions.explanationZh: U = 无反应，无法保护自身气道，必须干预并密切监测。
questions.explanationEn: U means unresponsive; the patient cannot protect their own airway and requires intervention and close monitoring.

questions.questionZh: 缩写 TKVO / TKO 的含义是？
questions.questionEn: What does the abbreviation TKVO / TKO mean?
questions.explanationZh: 在 abbreviations 中，TKO/TKVO = To keep vein open。
questions.explanationEn: In the abbreviations list, TKO/TKVO means To keep vein open.

questions.questionZh: 哪一个缩写代表 shortness of breath？
questions.questionEn: Which abbreviation stands for shortness of breath?
questions.explanationZh: SOB = shortness of breath。
questions.explanationEn: SOB stands for shortness of breath.

questions.questionZh: 治疗章节的 intent 是什么？
questions.questionEn: What is the intent of the Treatment Section?

options.zh: 为常规开展、但通常无单独 protocol 的治疗提供 guideline
options.en: To provide guidelines for treatments commonly carried out where protocols do not normally exist
To be used only for billing
To be used only by hospital nurses

questions.explanationZh: Treatment Section 的 intent 就是给许多常规治疗提供 guideline。
questions.explanationEn: The Treatment Section is intended to guide many common treatments where separate protocols do not normally exist.

questions.questionZh: References 中哪本书被明确列出？
questions.questionEn: Which textbook is explicitly listed in the References?

options.zh: Nancy Caroline’s Emergency Care in the Streets
options.en: Nancy Caroline’s Emergency Care in the Streets

questions.explanationZh: References 明确包含 Nancy Caroline’s Emergency Care in the Streets。
questions.explanationEn: The references explicitly include Nancy Caroline’s Emergency Care in the Streets.

questions.questionZh: Wound care 中，控制严重出血的优先方法顺序里，哪项属于可接受方法？
questions.questionEn: In wound care, which is an acceptable hemorrhage-control method in the listed order of preference?

options.zh: 先放开所有敷料观察五分钟
options.en: First leave the wound uncovered for five minutes
First have the patient walk around
Immediately soak the wound in water

questions.explanationZh: 文中列出 direct pressure、pressure dressing、positioning、tourniquet、extremity wound packing 等方法。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline lists direct pressure, pressure dressing, positioning, tourniquet use, and extremity wound packing as hemorrhage-control methods.

questions.questionZh: 哪类 wound packing 是不应进行的？
questions.questionEn: Which wound-packing action should NOT be performed?

options.zh: 在四肢交界性出血考虑 packing
options.en: Consider packing for suitable junctional/extremity bleeding
Packing a wound on the neck

options.zh: 在 direct pressure 无法控制、且非 tourniquet 区域时考虑 packing
options.en: Consider packing when direct pressure fails and the wound is not amenable to tourniquet use

questions.explanationZh: 指南明确：不要 pack 颈部、胸部或腹部伤口。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline specifically states not to pack wounds on the neck, chest, or abdomen.

questions.questionZh: 如果受伤肢体 distal pulse 缺失，可进行几次 re-alignment 尝试以恢复循环？
questions.questionEn: If distal circulation is absent in an injured limb, how many re-alignment attempts may be made to restore circulation?
questions.explanationZh: 指南说明：若 distal pulse 缺失，可尝试一次 re-align；若仍无脉，则按 unstable 处理。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline allows one attempt to re-align a pulseless injured limb; if circulation does not return, treat as unstable.

questions.questionZh: 保存 amputated part 时，哪项做法正确？
questions.questionEn: Which action is correct when preserving an amputated part?

options.zh: 用 saline-moistened sterile gauze 松松包裹后放入塑料袋并保持冷却
options.en: Wrap it loosely in saline-moistened sterile gauze, place it in a plastic bag, and keep it cool

questions.explanationZh: 正确做法是冲洗、湿纱布包裹、塑料袋封装、保持冷却并与病人一起转运。
questions.explanationEn: The proper method is to rinse gross debris off, wrap loosely in saline-moistened sterile gauze, place it in a plastic bag, keep it cool, and transport it with the patient.

questions.questionZh: 对于 amputated part，哪项属于 key point？
questions.questionEn: Which is a listed key point for an amputated part?

options.zh: Never place the part directly on ice
options.en: Never place the part directly on ice
Warm it as much as possible

questions.explanationZh: 文件明确说不要加热、不要泡水、不要直接放冰上、不要用 dry ice。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline states not to warm it, not to place it in water, not to place it directly on ice, and not to use dry ice.

questions.questionZh: musculoskeletal injuries 的 treatment component 包括哪项？
questions.questionEn: Which is part of the treatment component for musculoskeletal injuries?

options.zh: immobilize the joints above and below the injury site
options.en: Immobilize the joints above and below the injury site

options.zh: 让病人跑步测试稳定性
options.en: Have the patient run to test stability

options.zh: 故意释放牵引以观察疼痛
options.en: Release traction deliberately to observe pain

questions.explanationZh: musculoskeletal injuries treatment 包括 traction（适用时）、固定伤处上下关节、reapply cold、elevate 等。
questions.explanationEn: Treatment includes traction if appropriate, immobilizing the joints above and below the injury, reapplying cold, and elevation as appropriate.

questions.questionZh: 所有 hip dislocations 在 guideline 中被归入哪类转运？
questions.questionEn: All hip dislocations are placed in which transport category in the guideline?
questions.explanationZh: 指南明确写到 all hip dislocations are in the rapid transport category。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline explicitly states that all hip dislocations are in the rapid transport category.

questions.questionZh: traction splint 的标准适应证是什么？
questions.questionEn: What is the standard indication for a traction splint?

options.zh: stable patient 的 suspected mid-shaft femur fracture
options.en: Suspected mid-shaft femur fracture in a stable patient

questions.explanationZh: traction splint 页面明确适应证是 stable patient 的 suspected mid-shaft femur fractures。
questions.explanationEn: The traction splint indication is suspected mid-shaft femur fractures in stable patients.

questions.questionZh: 对于 closed mid-shaft femur fracture，traction splint 建议牵引重量是？
questions.questionEn: For a closed mid-shaft femur fracture, what traction amount is recommended?

options.en: 10% of body weight to a maximum of 15 lbs

questions.explanationZh: closed mid-shaft fracture: 10% body weight, max 15 lbs。
questions.explanationEn: For a closed mid-shaft fracture, use 10% of body weight to a maximum of 15 lbs.

questions.questionZh: 对于 open mid-shaft femur fracture，traction splint 最大牵引重量是多少？
questions.questionEn: For an open mid-shaft femur fracture, what is the maximum traction weight?
questions.explanationZh: open mid-shaft fracture 最大 5 lbs。
questions.explanationEn: For an open mid-shaft fracture, the maximum traction is 5 lbs.

questions.questionZh: 一旦 traction 已经施加，应该怎么做？
questions.questionEn: Once traction has been applied, what should you do?

options.zh: 每 2 分钟放掉再重拉
options.en: Release and reapply it every 2 minutes

questions.explanationZh: 指南明确写 once traction is applied, do NOT release traction。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline clearly states that once traction is applied, it must not be released.

questions.questionZh: 怀疑 pelvic injury 时，binder 中心应对准哪里？
questions.questionEn: When a pelvic injury is suspected, where should the center of the binder be aligned?
questions.explanationZh: pelvis binder 要 align with the greater trochanter。
questions.explanationEn: The binder should be centered at the level of the greater trochanter.

questions.questionZh: 哪种 pelvis binding 方式被明确视为不可接受？
questions.questionEn: Which method of pelvis binding is explicitly stated to be unacceptable?

options.zh: 三条重叠 broad triangular bandages
手动支撑直到放上 device
options.en: Manual support until moved to a device

questions.explanationZh: 指南明确写：Zap straps are NOT an acceptable form of binding。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline explicitly states that zap straps are not an acceptable form of pelvic binding.

questions.questionZh: 哪项是 pelvis binding 的 contraindication？
questions.questionEn: Which is a contraindication to pelvis binding?

options.en: Hemodynamic instability with a major mechanism

questions.explanationZh: contraindications 包含 neck-of-femur fractures 与 simple falls。
questions.explanationEn: Contraindications include neck-of-femur fractures and simple falls from standing height.

questions.questionZh: spinal management 的 indications 是什么？
questions.questionEn: What are the indications for spinal management?

options.zh: Follow the NEXUS criteria and the Canadian C-Spine guidelines
options.en: Follow the NEXUS criteria and the Canadian C-Spine guidelines

options.zh: 只在医院指示后才固定

questions.explanationZh: spinal management 页首直接写明 follow the NEXUS Criteria and the Canadian C-Spine Guidelines。
questions.explanationEn: The spinal management section directly states to follow the NEXUS criteria and Canadian C-Spine guidelines.

questions.questionZh: Spinal management 中，对头部固定的描述哪项正确？
questions.questionEn: Which statement about head fixation in spinal management is correct?

options.en: Only tape may be used on the head

questions.explanationZh: 指南在 spinal management 里注明 Do not tape the head。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline specifically says not to tape the head.

questions.questionZh: traumatic brain injury 的严重度中，GCS ≤ 8 属于？
questions.questionEn: In traumatic brain injury severity, a GCS ≤ 8 is classified as?
questions.explanationZh: GCS ≥13 mild；9-12 moderate；≤8 severe。
questions.explanationEn: GCS ≥13 is mild, 9–12 is moderate, and ≤8 is severe.

questions.questionZh: 所有 licence levels 在 TBI 中都应确保什么？
questions.questionEn: For all licence levels in TBI, what should be ensured?
questions.explanationZh: TBI intervention 明确要求 ensure adequate oxygenation，SpO2 >94%。
questions.explanationEn: The TBI guideline specifies ensuring adequate oxygenation with SpO2 above 94%.

questions.questionZh: 在 isolated TBI 中，哪种药物被明确列为 contraindicated？
questions.questionEn: Which medication is explicitly contraindicated in isolated TBI?
questions.explanationZh: 页面明确写：TXA is contraindicated for isolated TBIs。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline explicitly says TXA is contraindicated for isolated TBIs.

questions.questionZh: burn management 中建议的 cooling 时间是？
questions.questionEn: What cooling duration is recommended in burn management?
questions.explanationZh: burns 推荐 15–20 分钟 cooling，包含旁观者已经完成的有效降温时间。
questions.explanationEn: Burns should receive 15–20 minutes of cooling, including effective cooling already provided by bystanders.

questions.questionZh: 对于 burns，cooling 最推荐使用什么？
questions.questionEn: For burns, what method of cooling is preferred?
questions.explanationZh: 指南推荐 cool, not cold, running water。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline recommends cool—not cold—running water.

questions.questionZh: severely hypothermic patient 判断 pulselessness 时，可花多长时间？
questions.questionEn: How long may you take to determine pulselessness in a severely hypothermic patient?
questions.explanationZh: 严重低温病人可用 30–45 秒判断是否 truly pulseless。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline allows 30–45 seconds to determine pulselessness in a severely hypothermic patient.

questions.questionZh: severe hypothermia（<28°C）时应如何 rewarm？
questions.questionEn: How should severe hypothermia (<28°C) be managed with respect to rewarming?

options.zh: Do not actively rewarm; insulate and avoid rough handling
options.en: Do not actively rewarm; insulate the patient and avoid rough handling

questions.explanationZh: 严重低温不主动复温，应保温、防进一步失热，并避免粗暴搬运。
questions.explanationEn: Severe hypothermia should not be actively rewarmed; instead, prevent further heat loss and avoid rough handling.

questions.questionZh: 低温心脏骤停病人，若 AED 指示需要除颤，最多先除颤几次后不再为分析/电击而暂停 CPR？
questions.questionEn: In hypothermic cardiac arrest, after how many shocks should CPR continue without pausing for further analysis or shocks?
questions.explanationZh: 严重低温心脏骤停：如 indicated，可除颤最多三次，之后继续 CPR 不再暂停做分析或再 shock。
questions.explanationEn: In severe hypothermia with cardiac arrest, up to three shocks may be delivered; after that, continue CPR without pausing for further analysis or shocks.

questions.questionZh: Stroke guideline 中，哪项属于 all license levels intervention？
questions.questionEn: Which is an intervention for all licence levels in the stroke guideline?
questions.explanationZh: stroke intervention 包括 manage ABCs、SpO2 ≥94%、position、blood glucose check、FAST-VAN、timely transport。
questions.explanationEn: Stroke care includes ABC management, maintaining SpO2 ≥94%, positioning, blood glucose check, FAST-VAN recognition, and timely transport.

questions.questionZh: Stroke recognition 中，guideline 特别写了哪个 mnemonic？
questions.questionEn: Which mnemonic is specifically listed for stroke recognition in the guideline?
questions.explanationZh: stroke 页明确写 accurate recognition (FAST-VAN)。
questions.explanationEn: The stroke section explicitly calls for accurate recognition using FAST-VAN.

questions.questionZh: 对于 abdominal evisceration，正确处理是什么？
questions.questionEn: What is the correct management for abdominal evisceration?

options.en: Push the bowel back into the abdomen

options.zh: 用 moist sterile dressings 加 occlusive layer 覆盖，不要塞回去
options.en: Cover with moist sterile dressings and an occlusive layer; do not replace it into the abdomen

options.zh: 只用 dry gauze 擦拭
options.en: Wipe it with dry gauze only

questions.explanationZh: 指南写明 cover extruded bowel with moist sterile dressings then occlusive layer, do not place back in abdominal cavity。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline instructs providers to cover eviscerated contents with moist sterile dressings and an occlusive layer and not replace them into the abdominal cavity.

questions.questionZh: CHF / pulmonary edema 病人推荐体位是什么？
questions.questionEn: What positioning is recommended for CHF / pulmonary edema?

options.zh: sitting upright with legs hung down
options.en: Sitting upright with legs hung down

questions.explanationZh: CHF/pulmonary edema intervention 明确建议 upright, legs hung down。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline recommends sitting the patient upright with the legs hung down.

questions.questionZh: 在 chest trauma 中，open chest wound 应如何处理？
questions.questionEn: How should an open chest wound be managed in chest trauma?

options.zh: 用三边 occlusive dressing 或 commercial chest seal 封闭，并监测 tension pneumothorax
options.en: Seal it with a three-sided occlusive dressing or commercial chest seal and monitor for tension pneumothorax
Tell the patient to breathe deeply and wait

questions.explanationZh: 这正是 chest trauma 页写的标准处理。
questions.explanationEn: This is the stated standard management in the chest trauma section.

questions.questionZh: 对于 flail chest，guideline 指出应？
questions.questionEn: For flail chest, the guideline states you should?
questions.explanationZh: chest trauma 明确写 MANUALLY stabilize flail chest。
questions.explanationEn: The chest trauma guideline explicitly says to manually stabilize a flail chest.

questions.questionZh: 对 drowning / near drowning 或 pulmonary edema 病人，PCP on-scene 可以考虑什么？
questions.questionEn: For drowning / near drowning or pulmonary edema, what may a PCP consider on scene?
questions.explanationZh: CHF / pulmonary edema additional PCP intervention 包括 consider continuous positive airway pressure。
questions.explanationEn: The additional PCP interventions for CHF/pulmonary edema include considering CPAP.

questions.questionZh: CPAP 页在本 guideline 中适用于哪一类病人？
questions.questionEn: In this guideline, CPAP is presented for which type of patient?

options.zh: SOB with history of asthma/COPD and certain pulmonary edema/CHF contexts
options.en: SOB with a history of asthma/COPD and certain pulmonary edema/CHF contexts

questions.explanationZh: 目录里 CPAP 与 SOB / asthma/COPD 及 CHF/pulmonary edema 相关内容紧密相连。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline places CPAP with shortness of breath, asthma/COPD, and CHF/pulmonary edema management.

questions.questionZh: Stroke PCP additional intervention 之一是？
questions.questionEn: Which is one additional PCP intervention for stroke?

options.en: Apply traction first in all patients

questions.explanationZh: stroke 页写 PCP 可 en route obtain vascular access。
questions.explanationEn: The stroke section states that PCPs may obtain vascular access en route.

questions.questionZh: adult CPR/AED 与 child/infant CPR/AED 都出现在 guideline 的哪一大块？
questions.questionEn: Adult CPR/AED and child/infant CPR/AED appear under which major section of the guideline?
questions.explanationZh: 目录显示 CPR/AED 系列内容位于 Treatment Protocols 之下。
questions.explanationEn: The table of contents shows CPR/AED topics under Treatment Protocols.

questions.questionZh: shortness of breath with history of asthma/COPD 相关内容最可能考什么？
questions.questionEn: Questions on shortness of breath with a history of asthma/COPD would most likely examine what?

options.zh: 适应证、氧合/通气支持和相关药物/CPAP 决策
options.en: Indications, oxygenation/ventilation support, and related medication/CPAP decisions

questions.explanationZh: 这类条目在指南中与 SOB、asthma/COPD、CPAP、salbutamol/ipratropium 等内容相关。
questions.explanationEn: These sections connect shortness of breath, asthma/COPD, CPAP, and related medications such as salbutamol and ipratropium.

questions.questionZh: 在目录中，哪些药物被列入 drug monographs？
questions.questionEn: Which medication is listed in the drug monographs section?
questions.explanationZh: 目录列出的 drug monographs 包含 Naloxone (Narcan)。
questions.explanationEn: Naloxone (Narcan) is explicitly listed in the drug monographs section.

questions.questionZh: 哪项药物也被明确列为 monograph？
questions.questionEn: Which other medication is explicitly listed as a monograph?
questions.explanationZh: Tranexamic Acid 被列在 drug monographs。
questions.explanationEn: Tranexamic acid is listed in the drug monographs section.

questions.questionZh: Aspirin 的缩写在该 guideline 的 abbreviations 中写作？
questions.questionEn: How is Aspirin abbreviated in the guideline abbreviations?
questions.explanationZh: abbreviations 中 ASA = Acetylsalicylic acid, Aspirin。
questions.explanationEn: In the abbreviations list, ASA stands for acetylsalicylic acid, Aspirin.

questions.questionZh: 下列哪项最贴近 narcotic overdose 相关 guideline 的高频考点？
questions.questionEn: Which topic most closely matches a likely high-yield point from the narcotic overdose guideline?
questions.explanationZh: 目录中 narcotic overdose 与 naloxone monograph 相互呼应，属于高频考试逻辑。
questions.explanationEn: The overdose section pairs logically with naloxone and respiratory-support decision-making, making it a high-yield exam area.

questions.questionZh: Diabetic emergencies 搭配哪个 monograph 最直接？
questions.questionEn: Which monograph most directly pairs with diabetic emergencies?
questions.explanationZh: 糖尿病急症最直接相关的 monographs 包括 Oral Glucose、D10W、Glucagon。
questions.explanationEn: The diabetic-emergencies topic most directly connects with Oral Glucose, D10W, and Glucagon.

questions.questionZh: Cardiac chest pain 最直接相关的 monograph 之一是？
questions.questionEn: Which monograph is directly related to cardiac chest pain?
questions.explanationZh: cardiac chest pain 与 nitroglycerin、ASA 都是高相关内容。
questions.explanationEn: Cardiac chest pain commonly links to nitroglycerin and ASA in exam-oriented review.

questions.questionZh: Anaphylaxis 与哪种药物 monograph 最直接相关？
questions.questionEn: Anaphylaxis is most directly associated with which drug monograph?
questions.explanationZh: anaphylaxis 与 epinephrine 是最直接对应。
questions.explanationEn: Epinephrine is the most directly linked medication for anaphylaxis.

questions.questionZh: Practical examination grading 中，进入考站时默认分数是多少？
questions.questionEn: In the practical examination grading system, what score does the candidate begin with?
questions.explanationZh: practical evaluation 是从 100% 起算，再依据 deficiency 扣分。
questions.explanationEn: Practical evaluations begin at 100%, with deductions taken for deficiencies.

questions.questionZh: Practical exam 需要达到多少分才算通过？
questions.questionEn: What score is required to pass the practical exam?
questions.explanationZh: practical examination grading criteria 指出 70% is required to pass。
questions.explanationEn: The practical examination grading criteria state that 70% is required to pass.

questions.questionZh: 下列哪项最符合 Major Deficiency？
questions.questionEn: Which best fits a Major Deficiency?

options.zh: 遗漏一条非关键但相关的信息
options.en: Failing to include one non-critical but pertinent detail

options.zh: 当病人 presentation 明显需要时，完全未执行应做 skill
options.en: Failing to perform a skill when clearly indicated by the patient presentation

options.zh: 做对了但依据表达不充分
options.en: Performing a task correctly but with insufficient evidence to justify it

questions.explanationZh: Major deficiency 包含该做没做、gross errors、non-indicated skill 伤害病人、错误顺序影响 patient care。
questions.explanationEn: Major deficiencies include failing to perform an indicated skill, gross errors, harmful non-indicated actions, or sequencing errors that harm patient care.

questions.questionZh: Failure to provide critical information in a record or report 属于哪类 deficiency？
questions.questionEn: Failure to provide critical information in a record or report falls under which deficiency category?
questions.explanationZh: critical information 漏报属于 Moderate Deficiency。
questions.explanationEn: Failure to provide critical information in a report is listed as a Moderate Deficiency.

questions.questionZh: Failure to provide non-critical but pertinent information in a record/report 属于？
questions.questionEn: Failure to provide non-critical but pertinent information in a record/report is classified as?
questions.explanationZh: non-critical but pertinent information 漏掉属于 Minor Deficiency。
questions.explanationEn: Failure to provide non-critical but pertinent information is listed as a Minor Deficiency.

questions.questionZh: 实操 exam 结果想申请 review，practical exam 必须在 exam date 后几天内提出？
questions.questionEn: To request a review of practical exam results, within how many days of the exam date must the request be made?
questions.explanationZh: practical exam review 必须在 5 天内提出。
questions.explanationEn: A practical exam review request must be submitted within 5 days of the exam date.

questions.questionZh: practical exam review 结果一般在多久内告知 candidate？
questions.questionEn: Within what time frame will the candidate generally be informed of the practical review result?
questions.explanationZh: guideline 说 candidate will be informed within 2 weeks of submission。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline states that candidates will be informed within 2 weeks of submission.

questions.questionZh: 若 online written exam 已经 unsuccessful 两次，哪类 exam 可以 request feedback？
questions.questionEn: If unsuccessful twice on the online written exam, for which exam may a candidate request feedback?
questions.explanationZh: Written Exam Reviews 写明：若 candidate 在 EMALB online written exam 两次未过，可联系邮箱 request feedback。
questions.explanationEn: The Written Exam Reviews section states that after two unsuccessful attempts on the EMALB online written exam, candidates may request feedback.

questions.questionZh: online examinations accommodations 需要什么支持文件？
questions.questionEn: What supporting documentation is needed for online examination accommodations?

options.zh: authorized health care provider note 或明确 accommodations 的 IEP
options.en: A note from an authorized health care provider or an IEP clearly stating the required accommodations

questions.explanationZh: online exam accommodation 需要医生/授权医疗提供者说明或 IEP。
questions.explanationEn: Online accommodation requests require a note from an authorized health care provider or an IEP specifying the accommodations needed.

questions.questionZh: practical examinations 是否提供 accommodations？
questions.questionEn: Are accommodations available for practical examinations?

options.zh: 否，没有 accommodations；candidate 必须能执行所需技能
options.en: No; there are no accommodations, and candidates must be able to perform the required skills

questions.explanationZh: Exam Accommodations 页面明确说 practical examinations 没有 accommodations。
questions.explanationEn: The Exam Accommodations section explicitly states that there are no accommodations available for practical examinations.

questions.questionZh: 所有 licensing candidates（EMR、PCP 等）都必须完成哪项考试？
questions.questionEn: Which exam must all licensing candidates (EMR, PCP, etc.) successfully complete?
questions.explanationZh: EMR/PCP examination requirements 都写明 jurisprudence exam 必须完成。
questions.explanationEn: Both the EMR and PCP requirements specify that the jurisprudence examination must be completed successfully.

questions.questionZh: jurisprudence examination 一共有几题？
questions.questionEn: How many questions are on the jurisprudence examination?
questions.explanationZh: jurisprudence exam consists of 25 questions。
questions.explanationEn: The jurisprudence exam consists of 25 questions.

questions.questionZh: jurisprudence examination 及格线是多少？
questions.questionEn: What is the passing score for the jurisprudence examination?
questions.explanationZh: jurisprudence exam 80% pass。
questions.explanationEn: The passing score for the jurisprudence exam is 80%.

questions.questionZh: EMR written examination 的规模与时限是什么？
questions.questionEn: What are the size and time limit of the EMR written examination?
questions.explanationZh: EMR written exam = 200 questions, 2.5 hours。
questions.explanationEn: The EMR written exam consists of 200 questions with 2.5 hours to complete it.

questions.questionZh: EMR written exam 的 passing score 是多少？
questions.questionEn: What is the passing score for the EMR written exam?
questions.explanationZh: EMR written exam 75% required to pass。
questions.explanationEn: The EMR written exam requires 75% to pass.

questions.questionZh: EMR practical examinations 何时才会安排？
questions.questionEn: When will EMR practical examinations be scheduled?

options.zh: 只有 online written 和 jurisprudence exams 都通过后
options.en: Only after both the online written and jurisprudence exams have been successfully completed

options.zh: 只要 training provider 同意即可
options.en: As soon as the training provider agrees

questions.explanationZh: EMR practical 只有在 online written + jurisprudence 都通过后才会安排。
questions.explanationEn: EMR practical exams are not scheduled until both the online written and jurisprudence exams have been completed successfully.

questions.questionZh: EMR practical candidates 需要通过几个 scenario？
questions.questionEn: How many practical scenarios must EMR candidates successfully complete?
questions.explanationZh: EMR practical 由一个 medical call 和一个 trauma call 组成。
questions.explanationEn: The EMR practical consists of one medical and one trauma scenario.

questions.questionZh: 若 EMR practical medical scenario 分数低于 70%，会分配什么 remedial exam？
questions.questionEn: If an EMR candidate scores below 70% on the practical medical scenario, what remedial exam is assigned?
questions.explanationZh: EMR fail medical → another medical scenario。
questions.explanationEn: For EMR practical remediation, failing a medical scenario leads to another medical scenario.

questions.questionZh: PCP written examination 是由谁 administer 的？
questions.questionEn: Who administers the PCP written examination?
questions.explanationZh: PCP board approved written exams are administered by COPR。
questions.explanationEn: Board-approved written examinations for PCPs are administered by COPR.

questions.questionZh: PCP practical examination 由哪些部分组成？
questions.questionEn: What components make up the PCP practical examination?

options.zh: 一个 medical 和一个 trauma scenario
options.en: One medical and one trauma scenario

options.zh: 一个 jurisprudence + 一个 trauma

questions.explanationZh: PCP candidates 也需要 1 medical + 1 trauma practical。
questions.explanationEn: PCP candidates must also complete one medical and one trauma practical scenario.

questions.questionZh: Scheduling PCP Examinations 中，registration 是怎么分开的？
questions.questionEn: How is registration split in Scheduling PCP Examinations?

options.zh: 全部都由同一个 portal 处理
options.en: Everything is done through one portal

options.zh: COPR 和 EMALB 要分别注册不同考试部分
options.en: COPR and EMALB require separate registration for different exam components
Only a phone call to a hospital is needed

questions.explanationZh: PCP exam registration 是 through COPR and EMALB separately。
questions.explanationEn: PCP examinations are registered through COPR and EMALB separately.

questions.questionZh: 对于所有 required examinations，candidate 一共有几次机会？
questions.questionEn: How many attempts does a candidate have for each required examination?
questions.explanationZh: 文中写 candidates have three attempts to successfully complete each required exam。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline states that candidates have three attempts to complete each required examination successfully.

questions.questionZh: 如果三次都没通过 required examinations，下一步通常需要什么？
questions.questionEn: If a candidate fails a required examination three times, what is generally required next?

options.zh: 提交新的 recognized training program 成功完成证明
options.en: Submit proof of successful completion of a new recognized training program

questions.explanationZh: 三次失败后要重新完成 recognized training program 才能重新开始 exam process。
questions.explanationEn: After three failed attempts, candidates must provide proof of completing a new recognized training program before restarting the exam process.

questions.questionZh: 若 candidate practical exams fail 3 次后又完成新 program，在什么条件下可豁免 written/jurisprudence？
questions.questionEn: After failing practical exams three times and completing a new program, under what condition may a candidate be exempt from the written and/or jurisprudence exam?

options.zh: 新 program 后 6 个月内完成，并且第一次 written/jurisprudence 成绩达到 85% 以上
options.en: If completed within 6 months of the new program and the first-attempt written/jurisprudence score was 85% or higher

options.zh: 只要 practical examiner 同意
没有任何条件，自动豁免

questions.explanationZh: 文中给出 6 个月 + first attempt 85% 以上 两个条件。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline provides two conditions: completion within 6 months of the new program and a first-attempt score of at least 85% on the written and/or jurisprudence exam.

questions.questionZh: EMR scheduling 步骤中，basic BCeID 的一个要求是什么？
questions.questionEn: In the EMR scheduling steps, what requirement is given for the basic BCeID?

options.en: Use only lowercase characters in the username
It must include uppercase letters and symbols
It must match a driver’s licence number

options.zh: 可由 training provider 代办且无需本人参与
options.en: It can be created entirely by the training provider without candidate involvement

questions.explanationZh: Scheduling EMR Examinations 写明 basic BCeID username 请使用 lowercase。
questions.explanationEn: The EMR scheduling instructions state that the basic BCeID username should use only lowercase characters.

questions.questionZh: 创建 online learning system account 后，获得 access 可能需要多久？
questions.questionEn: After creating the online learning system account, how long may it take to receive access?
questions.explanationZh: 指南写明 may take up to 2 weeks to be granted access。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline says it may take up to 2 weeks to be granted access.

questions.questionZh: Applying for a Licence 章节指出，licence fees 何时必须支付？
questions.questionEn: According to Applying for a Licence, when must licence fees be paid?

options.zh: 取得 licence 前必须支付，但流程中任何时间都可提前缴纳
options.en: They are required to obtain the licence, but may be paid at any time during the application process

options.zh: 只有 practical exam 前 1 小时
options.en: Only one hour before the practical exam

options.zh: 必须在 training 开始前一年缴清
options.en: They must be paid one year before training starts

questions.explanationZh: licence fees 是取得 licence 所需，但可在 evaluation / application process 中任何时间先付。
questions.explanationEn: Licence fees are required to obtain the licence, but they may be paid at any point during the application/evaluation process.

questions.questionZh: 如果 candidate 在 evaluation process 中 unsuccessful，已交 licence fees 可以怎样处理？
questions.questionEn: If a candidate is unsuccessful in the evaluation process, what can be done about already-paid licence fees?

options.en: A refund may be requested in writing
They are automatically refunded in cash
They can only be converted into another practical attempt

questions.explanationZh: Applying for a Licence 说明 unsuccessful 时可以书面申请 refund。
questions.explanationEn: The guideline states that a written request for a refund may be made if the candidate is unsuccessful in the evaluation process.

questions.questionZh: patient assessment model 中，secondary survey 包括哪些内容？
questions.questionEn: What does the secondary survey include in the patient assessment model?

options.en: History, vital signs, and a head-to-toe examination

questions.explanationZh: model 明确写 secondary survey consists of history, vital signs, head-to-toe exam。
questions.explanationEn: The model specifically states that the secondary survey consists of history, vital signs, and a head-to-toe examination.

questions.questionZh: 在 patient assessment model 中，load and transport 可以什么时候发生？
questions.questionEn: In the patient assessment model, when may load and transport occur?

options.zh: 只能全部步骤做完以后
options.en: Only after every step is fully completed

options.zh: 根据病情稳定度与 definitive care availability，在 decision point 之后任何时间都可能适当
options.en: Depending on patient stability and definitive care availability, it may be appropriate at any time after the decision point

questions.explanationZh: 该模型脚注明确说 transport may be appropriate any time after the decision point。
questions.explanationEn: The model footnote explains that load and transport may be appropriate any time after the decision point depending on stability and definitive care availability.

questions.questionZh: 下列哪项 primary survey finding 也被视为 unstable adult patient？
questions.questionEn: Which of the following is also listed as an unstable adult primary survey finding?
questions.explanationZh: suspected cardiac chest pain 被列在 unstable primary findings。
questions.explanationEn: Suspected cardiac chest pain appears in the list of unstable primary findings.

questions.questionZh: 在 unstable anatomical findings 中，哪项属于 major penetrating trauma 的描述？
questions.questionEn: Which statement reflects the unstable anatomical finding related to major penetrating trauma?

options.zh: head, neck, torso, and extremities proximal to the knee or elbow
options.en: Head, neck, torso, and extremities proximal to the knee or elbow

questions.explanationZh: unstable anatomical findings 中的 major penetrating trauma 包含 head、neck、torso 和 proximal extremities。
questions.explanationEn: The unstable anatomical findings list major penetrating trauma to the head, neck, torso, and extremities proximal to the knee or elbow.

questions.questionZh: 哪项属于 unstable anatomical finding？
questions.questionEn: Which is an unstable anatomical finding?

options.zh: pulseless extremity after one failed attempt at re-alignment
options.en: A pulseless extremity after one failed attempt at re-alignment

questions.explanationZh: pulseless extremity 在一次 re-alignment 失败后仍无循环，属于 unstable anatomical finding。
questions.explanationEn: A pulseless extremity after one failed re-alignment attempt is listed as an unstable anatomical finding.

questions.questionZh: 哪项属于 unstable anatomical finding 中与骨骼损伤相关的项目？
questions.questionEn: Which item is an unstable anatomical finding related to skeletal injury?

options.zh: two or more proximal long bone fractures
options.en: Two or more proximal long bone fractures

questions.explanationZh: unstable anatomical findings 包括 two or more proximal long bone fractures。
questions.explanationEn: Two or more proximal long-bone fractures are included among the unstable anatomical findings.

questions.questionZh: 哪项是 unstable primary findings 列表中的内容？
questions.questionEn: Which item appears in the unstable primary findings list?

options.zh: 轻度荨麻疹但呼吸平稳

questions.explanationZh: anaphylaxis 被明确列入 unstable primary findings。
questions.explanationEn: Anaphylaxis is explicitly listed as an unstable primary finding.

questions.questionZh: 哪个 unstable primary finding 也与 time-sensitive transport 高度相关？
questions.questionEn: Which unstable primary finding is also highly time-sensitive for transport?

options.en: A cold from two weeks ago

questions.explanationZh: suspected CVA 被列为 unstable，且 stroke 管理高度强调 timely transport。
questions.explanationEn: Suspected CVA is listed as unstable, and the stroke guideline strongly emphasizes timely transport.

questions.questionZh: 关于 EMR / PCP 考试，哪句话正确？
questions.questionEn: Which statement about EMR / PCP examinations is correct?

options.zh: EMR 和 PCP 都不需要 practical
options.en: Neither EMR nor PCP requires a practical exam
The EMR written exam is administered by COPR

options.zh: PCP written 走 COPR，practical 和 jurisprudence 还要和 EMALB 这边对接
options.en: The PCP written exam goes through COPR, while practical and jurisprudence still involve EMALB processes

questions.explanationZh: PCP written 走 COPR；practical/jurisprudence 与 EMALB 流程相关。
questions.explanationEn: The PCP written exam is handled through COPR, while practical and jurisprudence requirements remain tied to EMALB processes.

questions.questionZh: 如果 jurisprudence exam 第二次仍未通过，第三次尝试前需要等待多久？
questions.questionEn: If a candidate is unsuccessful on the second attempt at the jurisprudence exam, how long must they wait before the third attempt?
questions.explanationZh: jurisprudence exam 第二次失败后需等 5 天再考第三次。
questions.explanationEn: After a second unsuccessful jurisprudence attempt, the candidate must wait 5 days before the third attempt.

questions.questionZh: 若 EMR written exam 第一次失败，最早多久后可重考？
questions.questionEn: If the EMR written exam is failed on the first attempt, what is the earliest re-attempt interval?
questions.explanationZh: EMR written 第一次失败后，可在 2 天后重考。第二次失败后则需等 5 天。
questions.explanationEn: After the first failed EMR written attempt, the candidate may re-attempt after 2 days; after the second failure, the wait is 5 days.

questions.questionZh: 如果你要基于这份 guideline 出 exam-oriented 题目，最正确的总体方向是什么？
questions.questionEn: If you are building exam-oriented questions from this guideline, what is the most appropriate overall direction?

options.zh: 只出纯背诵题，不考虑流程和优先级
options.en: Use only memorization questions without considering sequence or priority

options.zh: 把题目围绕 assessment flow、critical findings、protocol decisions、drug logic 和 exam policy 来组织
options.en: Organize questions around assessment flow, critical findings, protocol decisions, drug logic, and exam policy

options.zh: 只做 licence fee 相关题

questions.explanationZh: 这份 guideline 的价值就在于它不仅给知识点，还给考试流程、优先级、protocol、药物和 exam policy 逻辑。
questions.explanationEn: The real value of this guideline is that it supports not only factual recall, but also exam flow, prioritization, protocols, medications, and policy logic.
